name: scrivener-assistant
description: AI assistant for Scrivener writing projects — read binder structure, documents, and manage summaries, reviews, characters, and locations.
long_description: Connect Claude to your Scrivener projects. Read binder structure, document content (RTF auto-converted to plain text), and manage AI-generated summaries, style reviews, character profiles, and location notes — all stored safely inside your .scriv bundle.

tools.name: set_project_path
tools.description: Load a .scriv project by path

tools.name: get_current_project
tools.description: Get the currently loaded project path

tools.name: get_binder_structure
tools.description: Get the full binder hierarchy as JSON

tools.name: read_document
tools.description: Read document content by UUID

tools.name: update_metadata
tools.description: Update custom metadata fields on a document

tools.name: prepare_chapter_analysis
tools.description: Prepare a chapter for batch analysis (summary + metadata + review in one call)

tools.name: save_prompt
tools.description: Save a reusable prompt to the project library

tools.name: get_prompt
tools.description: Retrieve a saved prompt by name

tools.name: list_prompts
tools.description: List all saved prompts

tools.name: save_summary
tools.description: Save an AI-generated summary for a document

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Retrieve a saved summary

tools.name: save_review
tools.description: Save a style review for a document (versioned with history)

tools.name: get_review
tools.description: Get the current style review for a document

tools.name: get_review_history
tools.description: List archived review versions for a document

tools.name: get_previous_review
tools.description: Get the most recent archived review

tools.name: get_archived_review
tools.description: Retrieve a specific archived review by timestamp

tools.name: save_character
tools.description: Save a character profile

tools.name: get_character
tools.description: Retrieve a character profile by name

tools.name: list_characters
tools.description: List all saved character profiles

tools.name: save_location
tools.description: Save a location profile

tools.name: get_location
tools.description: Retrieve a location profile by name

tools.name: list_locations
tools.description: List all saved location profiles

project_path.title: Scrivener Project Path
project_path.description: Path to your .scriv project to load at startup. Leave empty to set it later using the set_project_path tool.
